name: Mira Vale
description: A brilliant stargazer who notices patterns in old murals before anyone else.

name: Rowan Cinderglass
description: A confident spell-slinger who respects bold choices and clean victories.

name: Selene Morcant
description: An ambitious student who knows which corridors listen after midnight.

name: Professor Orlan Quill
description: A patient mentor with ink-stained cuffs and a habit of hiding lessons inside riddles.
